categories.name: Create Your Own Combo
categories.subtitle: Pick any main from May Budget or Paldo Meal — ₱199 Only

items.name: Create Your Own Combo
items.description: Choose 1 main dish from May Budget or Paldo Meal. Comes with 2 rice, egg & soup. Add extras: Longganisa +₱40, Luncheon +₱25, Rice +₱20, Fried Egg +₱15. Example: Dinak + Chicken Silog.
